mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS id_site, g.total_error, s.warning_deviation_tracker, s.error_deviation_tracker FROM site s LEFT JOIN( SELECT COUNT( a.id ) AS total_error, d.id_site FROM device d LEFT JOIN alert a ON a.id_device = d.id LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.resolved = 0 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND s.enable_alert = 1
)g ON g.id_site = s.id WHERE SHA1(s.id) = #{hash_id}
